concept: Healthy / In Good Health / Functioning Well
description: In good physical or mental condition; functioning well. 'Wolu' names the quality of well-being—bodies that work as they should, minds that function clearly, systems that operate in balance.
sound_symbolism: The word flows with well-being. 'Wo' begins with rounded wholeness, wellness present. Then 'lu' flows with life-force, health moving through.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'wolu miona' (healthy person). Applies to individuals, communities, ecosystems—anything that can be in good or poor condition.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Healthy ecosystems, healthy communities, healthy individuals—all connected, each supporting the others.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Health of body supports health of mind—the Buddha taught care for the body as foundation for practice.
